categories.name: team-blueprints
categories.description: Blueprint-first team model replacing direct low-level team/type/role configuration as the primary UX and backend flow.

tasks.title: Define blueprint-first domain model for teams
tasks.notes: Introduce TeamBlueprint, BlueprintRole, BlueprintArtifact and TeamInstance/override boundaries. Do not optimize for backward compatibility unless trivial.

tasks.title: Implement backend persistence for team blueprints
tasks.notes: Add DB models, repository layer and validation for blueprint entities.

tasks.title: Add blueprint CRUD and instantiate API
tasks.notes: Expose GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE for blueprints and POST instantiate endpoint for team creation from blueprint.

tasks.title: Replace setup_scrum with blueprint instantiation flow
tasks.notes: Move Scrum and Kanban defaults into seed blueprints and route quick setup through blueprint instantiate.

tasks.title: Design blueprint-first Teams UI
tasks.notes: Replace raw tabbed CRUD as primary experience with Blueprints, Teams-from-Blueprint and Advanced sections.

tasks.title: Implement blueprint list/detail editor in frontend
tasks.notes: Master-detail or wizard-based blueprint editor with structured role/template/artifact editing.

tasks.title: Implement create-team-from-blueprint flow
tasks.notes: User selects blueprint, names team, assigns members and optional overrides, then instantiates.

tasks.title: Move low-level team/type/role maintenance into advanced mode
tasks.notes: Keep only if still needed operationally; otherwise retire the old screen after blueprint UI is stable.

tasks.title: Add contract and end-to-end tests for blueprint workflows
tasks.notes: Cover blueprint CRUD, instantiate, validation, seed blueprints and frontend happy-path flows.

tasks.title: Document blueprint-first team configuration model
tasks.notes: Update architecture docs, operator guidance and frontend/backend documentation to reflect the new primary configuration model.
